{{Quote|They are as free as they have the strength to be.|G'Mai Duris|<ref name="The Cestus Deception">''[[The Cestus Deception]]''</ref>}}
'''G'Mai Duris''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[X'Ting]] [[Regent/Legends|Regent]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] who lived during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was related to the original hive queen, but only tangentially.

==Biography==
Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] encountered her during their mission to undermine the partnership between [[Cestus Cybernetics]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

G'Mai Duris was later a victim of several attempts by her cousin [[Caiza Quill]] who was able to dethrone her from the position of regent. One attempt included Quill's killing of [[Filian]], Duris' lover, in a formal duel before the [[Hive Council]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[The Hive]]'' {{1st}}
